tasks.label: Verify UI modules
args: import importlib.util; mods=['pywinauto']; [print(f'{name}=' + ('installed' if importlib.util.find_spec(name) else 'missing')) for name in mods]

tasks.label: Install assistant to desktop
args: $root='C:\Users\Esisya\Desktop\Sistem-Takip-Paneli'; $desktop=[Environment]::GetFolderPath('Desktop'); $installDir=Join-Path $desktop 'Global_Turkce_Ses_Asistani'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $installDir | Out-Null; Copy-Item (Join-Path $root 'vscode_turkce_ses_asistani.py') $installDir -Force; Copy-Item (Join-Path $root 'requirements_turkce_ses_asistani.txt') $installDir -Force; Copy-Item (Join-Path $root 'global_ses_asistani_profiles.json') $installDir -Force; Copy-Item (Join-Path $root 'baslat_turkce_sesli_kopru.ps1') $installDir -Force; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $root 'models')) { Copy-Item (Join-Path $root 'models') $installDir -Recurse -Force }; $target='C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe'; $args='-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "' + (Join-Path $installDir 'baslat_turkce_sesli_kopru.ps1') + '"'; $shortcutPath=Join-Path $desktop 'Global Türkçe Ses Asistanı.lnk'; $shell=New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $shortcut=$shell.CreateShortcut($shortcutPath); $shortcut.TargetPath=$target; $shortcut.Arguments=$args; $shortcut.WorkingDirectory=$installDir; $shortcut.IconLocation='C:\Windows\System32\SHELL32.dll,220'; $shortcut.Save(); Write-Output ('INSTALL_DIR=' + $installDir); Write-Output ('SHORTCUT=' + $shortcutPath)

tasks.label: Install assistant to desktop via script
Verify desktop installed features
args: from pathlib import Path; text=Path(r'C:\Users\Esisya\Desktop\Global_Turkce_Ses_Asistani\vscode_turkce_ses_asistani.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); keys=['try_direct_write_to_focused_control','window_guard_blocked','append_audit_log','SUPPORTED_DIRECT_WRITE_CLASSES']; [print(f'{k}=ok' if k in text else f'{k}=missing') for k in keys]

tasks.label: Verify desktop assistant installed features
args: $text = Get-Content -Raw 'C:\Users\Esisya\Desktop\Global_Turkce_Ses_Asistani\vscode_turkce_ses_asistani.py'; 'try_direct_write_to_focused_control','window_guard_blocked','append_audit_log','SUPPORTED_DIRECT_WRITE_CLASSES' | ForEach-Object { if ($text.Contains($_)) { Write-Output ($_ + '=ok') } else { Write-Output ($_ + '=missing') } }
